sections.paragraph:
more rarely עֹולָה f.-

(1) what is laid on the altar, what is offered on the altar (see the root, Hiphil No. 1); specially i.q. כָּלִיל a burnt offering, a sacrifice of which the whole was burned, Gen 22:3, Gen 22:6 Lev 1:4, seq.

(2) ascent, steps, Eze 40:26.

Sometimes עֹלָה is contracted from עַוְלָה iniquity, which see.
